name: My Lecturer, My Husband
overview: Inggit's life is perfect with her 5 best friends, a lover named Tristan, and the love of her parents in Jogja. This perfection was reversed when Mr. Inggit was sick and matched him with Mr. Arya.

trailers.title: My Lecturer My Husband -  Official Trailer | 11 Desember 2020 di @WeTV Indonesia
